assertions.title: Webhook request contract remains backward compatible

steps.expected: Requests with unsupported event type rejected with 400
steps.observed: Test passed — unsupported event rejected with explicit 400 message

steps.expected: Requests with unsupported schemaVersion rejected with 400
steps.observed: Test passed — unsupported schemaVersion rejected with explicit 400 message

steps.observed: Tests passed — valid v1 requests accepted and processed

testNames: handleDiscoveryWebhook validates requests before running

handleDiscoveryWebhook rejects unsupported event with explicit 400 message
handleDiscoveryWebhook rejects unsupported schemaVersion with explicit 400 message

steps.expected: Missing secret → request rejected before run execution
steps.observed: Test passed — unconfigured webhook secret rejected

steps.expected: Mismatched secret → request rejected
steps.observed: Test passed — incorrect webhook secret rejected

steps.action: Run handle-discovery-webhook.test.ts — test: 'accepts requests with a correctly provided webhook secret'
steps.expected: Matching secret → request accepted and run proceeds
steps.observed: Test passed — correct webhook secret accepted

steps.action: Run handle-discovery-webhook.test.ts — test: 'rejects requests when webhook secret is unconfigured' (verifying no run started)

steps.observed: Auth rejection occurs before run execution

testNames: handleDiscoveryWebhook rejects requests when webhook secret is unconfigured

assertions.title: Preflight readiness blocks invalid real-integration runs

steps.action: Run credential-readiness.test.ts — test: 'validateSheetsCredentialReadiness reports missing service-account files explicitly'
steps.expected: Missing service account file produces explicit error
steps.observed: Test passed — missing file reported explicitly

steps.action: Run credential-readiness.test.ts — test: 'validateSheetsCredentialReadiness rejects malformed OAuth token JSON files'
steps.expected: Malformed OAuth token rejected
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run credential-readiness.test.ts — test: 'validateSheetsCredentialReadiness rejects revoked OAuth token files when refresh fails'
steps.expected: Revoked token rejected
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run credential-readiness.test.ts — test: 'handleDiscoveryWebhook fails fast when a configured service-account file is missing'
steps.expected: Webhook returns error before run execution when credential missing
steps.observed: Test passed — fails fast with explicit error

steps.action: Run credential-readiness.test.ts — test: 'handleDiscoveryWebhook fails fast when a configured OAuth token file is revoked'
steps.expected: Webhook returns error before run execution when token revoked
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run handle-discovery-webhook.test.ts — test: 'fails fast when no sheets credential is configured'
steps.expected: No credential → explicit error, no run started
steps.observed: Test passed

validateSheetsCredentialReadiness rejects malformed OAuth token JSON files
validateSheetsCredentialReadiness rejects revoked OAuth token files when refresh fails
handleDiscoveryWebhook fails fast when a configured service-account file is missing

summary: Tested 10 assertions (VAL-LOOP-CORE-001 through VAL-LOOP-CORE-010): all 10 passed. Ran 6 test files totaling 136 tests (handle-discovery-webhook: 39/39, credential-readiness: 5/5, cross-area-flows: 21/21, routing-enforcement: 21/21, config: 34/34, run-discovery: 16/16). Zero failures. Evidence saved to mission evidence directory.
